title: The Supreme Court (Number of Judges) Act, 1956
full_text: The Supreme Court (Number of Judges) Act, 1956 उच्चतम न्यायालय (न्यायाधीश संख्या) अधिनियम, 1956 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 195655 Act Number: 55 Enactment Date: 1956-09-16 Act Year: 1956 Short Title: The Supreme Court (Number of Judges) Act, 1956 Hindi Title: उच्चतम न्यायालय (न्यायाधीश संख्या) अधिनियम, 1956 Long Title: An Act to provide for an increase in the number of Judges of the Supreme Court, excluding the Chief Justice.
